name: Skin-format or plugin bug
about: A skin is misrendering, or the Figma plugin is misbehaving

labels: ["bug", "skin-format"]

## What's misrendering / misbehaving

## What tool produced the skin

- [ ] Figma plugin (this repo)
- [ ] Hand-edited `.msz`
- [ ] Converted from a classic Winamp `.wsz`
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Attachments

     - A screenshot showing the misrendering
     - If relevant: a debug export zip from the Figma plugin -->
